LightningComponentBundle.description: Centered call-to-action; logged-in users go to the dashboard, guests to login.

property.name: heading
property.label: Heading
property.default: Your Unified Login for Every Capsa Service

property.name: dashboardPage
property.label: Dashboard Page (API name)
property.description: Experience route API name opened for logged-in users. Takes precedence over the legacy URL. Guests always go to the login page.
